narrative:
Cols 54-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,176 registered voters, with 65.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.6 percentage points.
